name: Santa’s Stablehand
description:
Santa has his elves, sure, but clearly they’re not enough for this job. For the first time in a long time, a human has been hired by Old Saint Nick.

You’re the new stable hand. Each reindeer has their needs, and you’re the one that’s there to provide.

(Art by KrampusIvyy)
creator: CrunchyBen
